BMX Racing has established itself as one of the most exciting events at the Olympics. Colombiaâs Mariana Pajon is known as the Queen of BMX and has won gold in the womenâs event at London 2012 and Rio 2016, as well as a silver medal in Tokyo three years ago. In Paris, she just missed out on a place in the final. She told CGTNâs Dan Williams that she will carry on racing and says she is proud at how the sport has developed.
